name: aerodigestive-program
term: (aerodigestive[tiab] OR "aerodigestive program"[tiab] OR "aerodigestive team"[tiab]) AND (pediatric OR child*)

name: pediatric-airway-stenosis
term: ("laryngotracheal stenosis"[tiab] OR "subglottic stenosis"[tiab]) AND (pediatric OR child* OR infant*)

name: laryngomalacia
term: laryngomalacia[tiab] AND (pediatric OR child* OR infant*)

name: tracheoesophageal-fistula
term: ("tracheoesophageal fistula"[tiab] OR "esophageal atresia"[tiab]) AND (pediatric OR child* OR neonat*)

name: swallowing-pediatric
term: (FEES OR videofluoroscopy OR dysphagia[tiab]) AND (pediatric OR child*)

name: post-intubation-injury
term: ("post-intubation"[tiab] OR "acute laryngeal injury"[tiab] OR CALI[tiab]) AND (pediatric OR child*)

name: ai-pediatric-airway
term: ("artificial intelligence"[tiab] OR "machine learning"[tiab] OR "deep learning"[tiab]) AND ("pediatric airway"[tiab] OR laryngoscopy[tiab])
